reason_for_decision: The article passes because it grounds console layout in operator tasks and gives a practical zoning model that improves decision speed and handoff quality.
strengths: The four-zone console model is clear, memorable, and tightly tied to the real sequence of operator work.
The article avoids superficial control-room design commentary and instead focuses on eye-line, context switching, wallboard roles, and task execution.
It gives immediate design value for teams planning multi-sensor rooms, especially through the scenario-based validation section.
summary_assessment: This is a strong workflow-focused knowledge-base article. It reads like an applied design guide rather than generic UX advice and should be useful to both integrators and operators.
